Multiple episodes observed with consistent semiology: blank stare followed by rightward head version and right arm extension, progressing to either bilateral tonic–clonic activity or rhythmic jerks. The majority of events evolved into bilateral tonic–clonic seizures. Two episodes transitioned to rhythmic jerking movements with unresponsiveness at the end. All episodes shared identical initial features, suggesting a common seizure origin.
